data.title: Grupo Ezentis Approves Directors’ Remuneration Policy for 2024-2027
data.description:
GRUPO EZENTIS S.A ( (ES:EZE) ) has shared an announcement.

Grupo Ezentis S.A. has approved its Directors’ Remuneration Policy for 2024 to 2027, emphasizing the attraction and retention of qualified directors while ensuring long-term sustainability and shareholder value. The policy outlines remuneration systems, including fixed annual amounts and fees for meeting attendance, aiming to motivate directors without compromising their independence, and aligns with the company’s strategic objectives and market competitiveness.

More about GRUPO EZENTIS S.A

Grupo Ezentis S.A. operates in the infrastructure and telecommunications industry, providing services related to the development, operation, and maintenance of telecommunications networks. The company focuses on enhancing connectivity and infrastructure capabilities, primarily targeting markets that require robust telecommunications solutions.

YTD Price Performance: 35.56%

Average Trading Volume: 38,113

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: €58.47M

data.title: Radius Gold Expands Tierra Roja Copper Project in Peru
data.description:
Radius Gold ( (TSE:RDU) ) has shared an announcement.

Radius Gold Inc. has secured an exclusivity agreement to expand its Tierra Roja copper project in southern Peru by 1,800 hectares, bringing the total project area to 3,670 hectares. Additionally, the company has the option to explore an extra 4,500 hectares across three new targets, positioning Radius Gold strategically within one of the world’s leading copper-producing belts, potentially enhancing its market presence and stakeholder value.

More about Radius Gold

Radius Gold Inc. operates within the mining industry, focusing primarily on the exploration and development of mineral properties. The company is engaged in identifying and expanding opportunities in key mineral-rich regions, particularly in copper production areas.

YTD Price Performance: 50.0%

Average Trading Volume: 190,609

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$12.89M

data.title: Banco Santander Grants Shares Under Deferred Remuneration Plan
data.description:
Banco Santander ( (ES:SAN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Banco Santander S.A. has announced a transaction involving the granting of shares to Mr. David Arthur Hazell, a Senior Executive Vice-President, under its deferred variable remuneration plans. These shares, listed on the New York Stock Exchange as American Depositary Receipts, were delivered as part of deferred payments related to the years 2021, 2022, and 2023, with the transaction executed on February 27, 2025. This move reflects the company’s ongoing commitment to aligning executive compensation with long-term performance, potentially impacting its market positioning and stakeholder relations.

More about Banco Santander

Banco Santander S.A. is a leading global financial institution, primarily engaged in providing a wide range of banking and financial services. The company is known for its strong presence in retail and commercial banking, and it operates across various international markets, focusing on delivering value to its stakeholders.

data.title: Nutrien Ltd. Releases 2024 Modern Slavery Report
data.description:
Nutrien ( (TSE:NTR) ) has shared an update.

On February 28, 2025, Nutrien Ltd. released its Modern Slavery Report for the financial year ending December 31, 2024, in compliance with Canada’s Fighting Against Forced Labour and Child Labour in Supply Chains Act. The report outlines Nutrien’s commitment to identifying and mitigating risks of modern slavery within its operations and supply chains. By engaging with stakeholders and adhering to international human rights standards, Nutrien aims to ensure ethical practices throughout its business activities, which include producing and distributing crop nutrients and services globally.

More about Nutrien

Nutrien Ltd. is a leading global provider in the agriculture industry, primarily producing potash and nitrogen products and distributing crop inputs and services. The company operates a vast network of production, distribution, and retail facilities across North America, South America, and Australia, serving the needs of farmers through its retail, potash, nitrogen, and phosphate segments.

YTD Price Performance: 16.01%

Average Trading Volume: 2,210,943

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $25.91B

data.title: Neodecortech S.p.A. Advances Share Buyback Program
data.description:
Neodecortech SpA ( (IT:NDT) ) has issued an update.

Neodecortech S.p.A. announced the purchase of 5,200 own shares between February 24 and February 28, 2025, as part of its ongoing share buyback program. This move, executed at an average price of 2.8268 Euros per share, reflects the company’s strategic efforts to manage its share capital and potentially enhance shareholder value.

More about Neodecortech SpA

Neodecortech S.p.A. is a leading European company specializing in the production of decorative surfaces for melamine panels and flooring, primarily serving the interior design sector. The company offers a comprehensive range of technologically advanced solutions, including decorative papers, prints, finish foil, melamine film, laminates, and anti-fingerprint surfaces, covering all stages of production from raw material management to logistics.

data.title: Oceanic Wind Energy Reports Strong First Quarter Results
data.description:
Oceanic Wind Energy ( ($TSE:NKW.H) ) has provided an announcement.

Oceanic Wind Energy Inc. reported a significant financial turnaround in the first quarter ending December 31, 2024, with a net income of $1.36 million compared to a net loss of $0.1 million in the same period the previous year. This improvement is largely attributed to the sale of its subsidiary, NaiKun Wind Development Inc., which contributed $1.5 million to the quarter’s results, enhancing the company’s cash position and financial outlook.

More about Oceanic Wind Energy

Oceanic Wind Energy Inc. operates in the renewable energy industry, focusing on wind energy development. The company is involved in the sale and development of wind energy projects, aiming to contribute to sustainable energy solutions.

data.title: Novabase Engages in Strategic Share Buy-Back Program
data.description:
Novabase SGPS ( (GB:0MTZ) ) has shared an announcement.

Novabase has been actively engaging in a share buy-back program, as approved by its Board of Directors in December 2024. Between February 21 and February 28, 2025, the company, through Caixa – Banco de Investimento, S.A., acquired shares representing its share capital on Euronext Lisbon. As of February 28, 2025, Novabase held a total of 674,069 own shares, accounting for 1.88% of its share capital. This move is part of a strategic effort to manage its shareholdings and potentially enhance shareholder value.

More about Novabase SGPS

Novabase SGPS is a company involved in the management of shareholdings, with its shares admitted to trading on a regulated market. It is headquartered in Lisbon, Portugal, and operates within the financial sector.

data.title: Skeena Resources Raises C$88.3 Million for Eskay Creek Project
data.description:
Skeena Resources ( (TSE:SKE) ) has shared an update.

Skeena Resources announced on February 18, 2025, an agreement with underwriters led by BMO Capital Markets to purchase 4,800,000 common shares at C$14.70 each, raising approximately C$70.5 million. By February 26, 2025, the company closed the offering, raising C$88.3 million by selling 3,290,000 common shares and 2,230,000 flow-through shares. The proceeds will fund the Eskay Creek project and other corporate purposes, with flow-through shares supporting Canadian development expenses.

More about Skeena Resources

Skeena Resources Limited is a Canadian mining company focused on the exploration and development of precious metal projects, primarily gold and silver. The company is advancing its Eskay Creek project in British Columbia, a significant gold-silver deposit.

data.title: Lion Finance Group Executes Share Buyback to Enhance Shareholder Value
data.description:
Bank of Georgia Group Plc ( (GB:BGEO) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Lion Finance Group PLC announced a transaction involving the repurchase of 10,000 of its own shares on the London Stock Exchange as part of an ongoing share buyback and cancellation program. This move is part of a strategy to manage the company’s capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value by reducing the number of shares in circulation, which could positively impact the company’s stock price and market perception.

More about Bank of Georgia Group Plc

Lion Finance Group PLC is a FTSE 250 holding company that operates through its subsidiaries to provide banking and financial services in the high-growth markets of Georgia and Armenia. The company focuses on customer-centric universal banking through Bank of Georgia and Ameriabank, aiming to drive business growth, sustain high profitability, and generate strong returns while contributing positively to the communities it serves.

data.title: Nutrien Releases 2024 Annual Disclosures
data.description:
Nutrien ( (TSE:NTR) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On February 28, 2025, Nutrien Ltd. announced the availability of its 2024 Annual Report, which includes Management’s Discussion and Analysis, Audited Consolidated Financial Statements, and Annual Information Form. These documents are accessible on the US Securities and Exchange Commission’s EDGAR website and the Canadian Securities Administrators’ website. This release marks a significant step in Nutrien’s commitment to transparency and stakeholder engagement, reinforcing its position in the global agricultural industry.

More about Nutrien

Nutrien is a leading global provider of crop inputs and services, operating a world-class network of production, distribution, and agricultural retail facilities. The company focuses on creating long-term value by prioritizing investments that enhance its business advantages across the agricultural value chain, while maintaining essential resources and stakeholder relationships.
